expiring_today.title: Full Stack Developer
expiring_today.description:
Role Summary
We are a live, high-volume digital distribution platform for mobile airtime and telecom services in Afghanistan. Our platform is already in production, processing a significant volume of transactions daily across all major Afghan mobile network operators. We are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based in Kabul to take ownership of our technical infrastructure and ensure continuity, stability, and growth of the platform.

Duties and Responsibilities
Take full ownership of a live production platform currently processing high-value transactions across Afghan telecom networks.
Maintain and improve direct API integrations with all major Afghan mobile network operators: MTN Afghanistan, Roshan, Salaam, AWCC, Etisalat, and others.
Manage USSD, IVR, and SMS gateway integrations for airtime top-up and telecom service delivery.
Develop and maintain backend systems handling transaction processing, routing logic, operator limit enforcement, and reconciliation.
Build and maintain front-end portals and dashboards for three user tiers: distributors, sub-agents, and end users.
Implement and maintain secure token management, credential handling, and IP whitelisting protocols required by operator APIs.
Ensure zero-downtime operation of a platform handling large daily transaction volumes.
Design and maintain idempotency and retry mechanisms to prevent duplicate or failed transactions.
Manage wallet and balance reconciliation across all operator networks.
Monitor system health proactively and resolve operator connectivity issues before they impact business.
Liaise directly with local telecom operator technical teams for onboarding, troubleshooting, and updates.
Maintain clear handover and technical documentation throughout the transition and beyond.

Job Requirements
Technical Requirements:
3+ years of full stack development experience (Node.js or Python backend; React or similar frontend).
Proven experience maintaining or inheriting a live production system — not just greenfield development.
Hands-on experience with REST API integrations and authentication flows (OAuth2, token-based auth).
Experience with USSD, IVR, or SMS gateway integration is strongly preferred.
Familiarity with Afghan telecom operator systems and local network infrastructure is a significant advantage.
PostgreSQL or similar relational database experience.
Strong understanding of transaction idempotency, financial reconciliation, and error handling in high-volume environments.
Experience building multi-tier user portals (admin, agent, end-user levels).
Basic AWS or cloud infrastructure knowledge.
What makes you a strong candidate:
You are based in Kabul and have existing relationships or familiarity with Afghan telecom operators.
You have worked on airtime, mobile money, or fintech distribution systems in Afghanistan before.
You are comfortable taking over a live system with real financial consequences and managing it independently.
You communicate clearly in Dari or Pashto with local operator teams, and in English for technical documentation.
You are reliable, accountable, and understand the responsibility of managing a production financial platform.

Submission Guidelines
All interested and qualified candidates should fill out the application ( https://forms.gle/uMPKzFQ78M2cQHAr7 ) no later than June 26, 2026 .
Kindly rename your CV with your full name before submitting it.
Note:
Applicants who do not complete the online application form will not be considered.
Only short-listed candidates will be called for a written test and subsequent interview.
Tests and Interview will be conducted on a rolling basis.

expiring_today.title: Information System Security Assistant Administrator
expiring_today.description:
Role Summary
The Information System Security Assistant Administrator is responsible for assisting the Information System Security (ISS) Administrator with the administration of the IT corporate firewall and deployment of security parameters to secure the IT corporate network and AWCC’s digital assets from unauthorized users and hackers by using his/her knowledge of information security principles and practices. He/she, under the direct guidance and supervision of the ISS Administrator and Network Infrastructures & Security (NIS) Assistant Administrator, will work closely to provide 24/7 systems security services for all IT domains, and IP data communications of AWCC IT/GSM platforms.

Duties and Responsibilities
Ensure that each department has proper/complete Service Level Agreements (SLA) based on the security policy of AWCC IT domain.
Provide security administration support for information systems and applications (e.g. UNIX, Windows, etc.) including Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) solutions.
Provide complex, technical, and enforcement of security directives, orders, standards, plans, and procedures at server sites.
Run periodic vulnerability identifications in software packages and related tools, to immediately highlight errors in systems configuration, and indicate the need for application fixes and patches, and other security-related changes.
Ensure that digital data on the systems/applications, databases, web servers, and operating systems are protected from unauthorized access and any outsider attacks.
Ensure that systems/applications, databases, web servers, and other related services are protected from exposures, based on procedures and manuals.
Ensure that all point-to-point/point-to-multi-point connections are secured from outsider attacks, and the best recommended protocols are in use to secure digital data transmissions.
Gather evidence on systems, using security scripts, port scanning tools, and checklists to provide analysis and mitigation of threats and vulnerabilities.
Deploy mechanisms that ensure all the outside to the inside of AWCC IT domains accesses are based on secure tunneling (e.g. VPN) and ensure the ease of access according to the service level agreements and manuals/procedures.
Advise related teams on the new attacks and exposures daily and give them sufficient solutions.
Develop complex technical and pragmatic assessments, to evaluate engineering and integration initiatives and provide complex technical support for access security policies, standards, and guidelines.
Identify and oversee the installation, modification, or replacement of hardware or software components and any configuration changes that affect security policies.
Assess the impact on the business unit/customer, caused by theft, destruction, alteration, or denial of access to information and report to related chain.
Develop, maintain, and help the implementation of in-depth Information Awareness programs through training and educating within AWCC.
Assess the knowledge level and capabilities of ISS team members based on the assessment, assisting in training and capacity building of the team members.

Job Requirements
A bachelor's degree in computer science/information technology or related fields (master’s degree is preferred).
3 to 4 years of experience in information systems security or related field.
Certified in any IT Security Certifications.
Must be certified in CCNA Security or JNICA Security and candidates with JNCIP-Sec or CCNP Security will be highly preferred.
The ideal candidate for this position would have an organizational background, with technical experience, related to the use of Microsoft, Juniper, Cisco, SQL, Oracle platforms, Linux, etc.
Working knowledge of Global Security Standards such as ISO 27K family and ability to check and ensure compliance of the deployed security measures with the mentioned security standards.
Ability to stay up to date on the latest intelligence, including hackers’ methodologies, to anticipate security breaches.
Ability to meet deadlines, work under pressure, good negotiation and organizational skills.
Ability to Provide 24/7 network services for the AWCC corporate environment, plus flexible work schedules, and occasional evening and weekend work.

Submission Guidelines
The interested candidates should fill out and submit the APPLICATION FORM with complete and correct information. To have access to the APPLICATION FORM, please copy and paste the link into your Web Browser.
https://forms.gle/NNPsLnmLgBCzBhsJ6

expiring_soon.title: Internal Audit Officer
expiring_soon.description:
About MISFA Ltd
The Microfinance Investment and Support Facility for Afghanistan (MISFA) is an apex organization that was established in 2003 to support the development of the microfinance sector through funding and technical assistance to microfinance institutions and to act as a catalyst for innovation. MISFA’s mission is to contribute to Afghanistan’s economic growth by developing a viable, inclusive financial sector for the poor, and the underserved small and medium enterprises. MISFA is wholly owned by the Government of Afghanistan-Ministry of Finance, and has been funded by a range of international multi and bi-lateral donors.
MISFA’s functions are accomplished through a number of departments and units, including Finance and Administration, Program Management, Monitoring & Supervision, Research & Innovation, Public Information & Communication, Information Technology and Human Resources.

Job Descriptions
The scope of the Internal Audit will be to:
a. Develop a risk-based annual internal audit plan in consultation with the Board/Audit Committee and senior management.
b. Conduct financial, operational, compliance, and performance audits across all departments of MISFA.
c. Identify weaknesses and gaps in internal controls and provide actionable recommendations.
d. Ensure compliance with laws, regulations, and internal policies.
e. Monitor the implementation of audit recommendations and track progress.
f. Assess the adequacy and effectiveness of internal controls, risk management, and governance systems.
g. Ensure the efficient and effective use of resources.
h. Follow up on the implementation of External Audit and previous Internal Auditors’ recommendations.
i. Ensure maintenance of financial and other key records.
j. Ensure management of fixed assets.
k. Ensure expenses are incurred in accordance with the established procedures.
l. Ensure Petty cash is managed as per the finance manual.

Job Requirements
· Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field (ACCA, CIA, or equivalent preferred).
· Minimum 3–5 years of internal audit experience, preferably in the financial or microfinance sector.
· Strong knowledge of IIA standards, risk-based auditing, and microfinance operations.
· Familiarity with Microfinance KPIs (e.g., PAR, OSS, write-offs, portfolio quality).
· Experience with internal controls, risk assessment, and compliance monitoring.

Submission Guidelines
The application package, acceptable in English language only, should comprise an up-to-date resume and cover letter explaining your interest and suitability for the position.
Interested candidates should submit their application package only by e-mail with the subject “Vacancy – Internal Audit Officer” to jobs@misfa.org.af . The application deadline is June 27, 2026.
Due to the expected large number of applications, only shortlisted candidates would be contacted.

Submission Email
jobs@misfa.org.af
Apply

About Terre des hommes (Tdh) Foundation
The Terre des hommes Foundation (Tdh), with headquarters in Lausanne and an office in Zurich, is the leading Swiss child rights organisation with more than 2000 employees worldwide. We stand together with children to uphold their rights, protect their lives and improve their well-being. We achieve this through innovative programmes focused on health, migration and access to justice, specially designed to have a positive and sustainable impact.
Tdh has been working in Afghanistan since 1995 and carry out projects related to Child Protection, Mother and Child health and Livelihood Programs in Kabul, Balkh, Kunar and Nangarhar provinces.

Job Description
Job Summary :
The Data Entry Clerk is responsible for accurately entering, organizing, filing, cross-checking, and verifying all documents received from health facilities and project areas. The role includes recording project-related information into designated database systems and generating reports in line with agreed formats. The Data Entry Clerk ensures timely and precise data entry for all project requirements and develops an action plan to maintain consistency, accuracy, and adherence to deadlines.
Main responsibilities:
Accurately enter project-related data (e.g., questionnaires, attendance lists, follow-up forms) into Access or Excel databases.
Ensure timely and consistent data entry of information provided by Health Facilities staff, project assistants, social workers, and animators.
Maintain data integrity and confidentiality of all beneficiary information in coordination with the line manager and relevant staff.

Experience / Skills :
Minimum two year of experience in data entry or a related role.
Languages:
Strong proficiency in local languages and good working knowledge of English
IT knowledge :
Strong skills in Excel, Word, and Kobo

expiring_soon.title: GIS and Environmental Specialist
expiring_soon.description:
About REHA Organization
About REHA:
Resilience, Environment, and Humanitarian Aid (REHA) is a national NGO registered with the Afghan Ministry of Economy, specializing in environmental protection, climate change, disaster risk reduction, and cross-cutting areas such as agriculture, livelihood support, and humanitarian assistance. REHA employs a balanced approach, combining “hard” interventions (e.g., infrastructure, resource management) with “soft” interventions (e.g., capacity building, advocacy) to address the needs of communities affected by climate and humanitarian crises.
REHA’s unique strengths include designing and implementing advocacy campaigns, conducting capacity-building training, performing risk and vulnerability assessments, developing policies, and raising awareness. These efforts are complemented by physical interventions and community empowerment and development initiatives aimed at building resilience against natural and man-made disasters, emergencies, and climate change impacts.
With over 20 years of expertise, REHA’s team excels in climate change governance, disaster risk management, and environmental protection, supported by strong capabilities in program management, organizational strengthening, and financial and operational oversight.
About the Project:
Upon successful approval of the project proposal by UNDP, REHA Organization will proceed with the implementation of the Community-based Climate-Responsive Livelihoods and Forestry (CCLF) Project in Keshm District of Badakhshan Province. The project is designed to strengthen the resilience of rural communities to climate change through an integrated package of community mobilization, climate-responsive planning, resilient livelihoods, small-scale infrastructure, and restoration of natural resources, forestry and rangeland ecosystems. Afghanistan remains highly vulnerable to droughts, flash floods, soil erosion, watershed degradation, declining vegetation cover and reduced agricultural productivity. The CCLF implementation phase will support climate-resilient livelihoods, community infrastructure, forestry and rangeland management, with strong attention to community engagement, gender inclusion, social and environmental safeguards, monitoring, documentation and coordination with relevant stakeholders in Keshm District of Badakhshan Province.

Job Descriptions
Upon successful approval of the project proposal by UNDP, the GIS and Environmental Specialist will provide technical support for GIS mapping, spatial analysis, environmental screening, site verification and climate-risk-informed planning under the CCLF project in Keshm District of Badakhshan Province. The position will ensure that environmental and spatial data support quality implementation, safeguards compliance and evidence-based decision-making.
Key Responsibilities:
1. GIS Mapping and Spatial Analysis
· Prepare GIS maps, spatial datasets and location-based analysis for project planning, implementation and monitoring.
· Collect, verify and manage GPS data related to livelihood, forestry, rangeland, infrastructure and restoration sites.
· Support vulnerability mapping, site prioritization and visualization of community-level intervention areas.
2. Environmental Screening and Safeguards
· Conduct environmental screening and support assessment of potential environmental risks linked to project interventions.
· Provide technical input for site selection, environmental mitigation measures and safeguard compliance.
· Ensure project activities consider watershed conditions, erosion risks, vegetation cover, land use and local environmental sensitivities.
3. Technical Documentation and Data Management
· Maintain GIS databases, maps, GPS records, field evidence and environmental documentation in an organized manner.
· Support development of technical maps, environmental inputs and annexes for project reports and implementation packages.
· Coordinate with M&E, forestry, livelihoods and infrastructure teams to integrate spatial evidence into planning and reporting.
4. Field Coordination and Capacity Support
· Conduct field visits to verify site information, environmental conditions and geospatial data accuracy.
· Provide technical guidance to field teams on GPS data collection, map use and environmental observations.
· Coordinate with local stakeholders and technical teams to support accurate and context-specific site selection.
Key Deliverables:
· GIS maps and spatial analysis products prepared for project planning and reporting.
· GPS data, site information and environmental evidence collected and maintained.
· Environmental screening and site selection inputs provided for approved interventions.
· Technical maps and environmental annexes prepared for reports and implementation packages.
· Field teams supported on GPS data collection and environmental observations.

Job Requirements
· Minimum bachelor’s degree in GIS, Environmental Science or a related discipline.
· Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in GIS mapping, spatial analysis and environmental assessment.
· Experience in environmental screening, site selection, vulnerability mapping and field data collection.
· Strong knowledge of GPS tools, GIS software, mapping, database management and spatial reporting.
· Understanding of climate change, natural resource management, forestry, watershed and rural environmental issues.
· Good coordination, documentation and analytical skills.
· Fluency in Pashto and Dari is required; proficiency in oral and written English is required.

Submission Guidelines
CV must be under 1MB; no certificates attached.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
Qualified candidates are encouraged to apply via: https://forms.gle/uuMiv67FzND4GGQp9
REHA is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity, equality, transparency, environmental protection, and zero tolerance for discrimination, harassment, corruption, and misconduct.

Submission Email
https://forms.gle/uuMiv67FzND4GGQp9

About Afghan Barakat Financial Services Company ( Barakat Pay )
BarakatPay is an emerging Electronic Money Institution (EMI) project committed to delivering secure, innovative, and accessible digital financial services in Afghanistan. The company aims to strengthen financial inclusion and support the development of the country's digital payment ecosystem through technology, regulatory compliance, and operational excellence.
BarakatPay is committed to maintaining high standards of information security, corporate governance, risk management, customer protection, and regulatory compliance.

Job Descriptions
BarakatPay is an Electronic Money Institution (EMI) project being established in Afghanistan to provide secure, reliable, and innovative digital financial services. The company is developing electronic payment solutions for customers, merchants, agents, corporate clients, NGOs, and payment ecosystem partners under a regulated financial framework.
BarakatPay is seeking a qualified and responsible IT & Systems Security Officer to support the organization's technology infrastructure, system security controls, user access management, cloud coordination, technical documentation, and operational readiness. The position plays an important role in maintaining secure and efficient IT operations while supporting compliance with regulatory and internal security requirements.
The successful candidate will work closely with management, compliance, operations, technology vendors, and external service providers to ensure proper administration of systems, devices, security controls, and technical records.
Key Responsibilities:
• Support daily IT operations, system monitoring, and technical coordination activities.
• Maintain user access records, email accounts, system accounts, and access change logs.

tech_banking_jobs.category: Economy, Information Technology, Finance, Business Administration
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
هدف وظیفه:
هدف این بست مدیریت دفتر ساحوی نقدپی در داخل بازار صرافی و حمایت از تمام فعالیت ‌ های عملیاتی تأیید شده نقدپی در سطح بازار است . مسئول موظف است مشتریان، اجنت ‌ ها و صرافان را ثبت ‌ نام کند، معلومات ابتدایی خدمات را ارائه نماید، به پرسش ‌ های مرتبط با تراکنش ‌ ها پاسخ دهد، مشکلات را ثبت کند، موارد لازم را به دیپارتمنت ‌ های مربوطه ارجاع دهد و گزارش ‌ های منظم را به مدیریت نقدپی ارائه کند .

Duties and Responsibilities
وظایف و مسئولیت‌ها:
مدیر دفتر ساحوی (Site Branch Manager) تحت رهنمود مدیر بخش عملیاتی فعالیت نموده و مسئولیت‌های ذیل را بر عهده خواهد داشت:
1) توسعه بازار و جذب مشتریان (Business Acquisition):
شناسایی، تحلیل وجذب مشتریان جدید( MSP ها، تجار، شرکت‌ها).
ایجاد و توسعه فرصت‌های تجاری در مناطق هدف.
معرفی خدمات و راهکارهای شرکت نقدپی برای مشتریان بالقوه .
پیگیری مستمر فرصت‌ها تا مرحله نهایی (conversion).
2) مدیریت مشتریان و اجنت ها ( Agents & customers Management):
ایجاد وحفظ روابط مؤثر با مشتریان، اجنت ها و ذینفعان.
مدیریت جلسات حضوری و آنلاین جهت توسعه همکاری‌ها .
پیگیری نیازمندی‌های مشتریان، اجنت ها و ارائه راه‌ حل‌ های مناسب.
3) تحلیل بازار و فرصت‌ها (Market Analysis):
انجام تحقیقات بازار و تحلیل رقبا در بخش فین‌تک و خدمات مالی دیجیتال .
شناسایی فرصت‌های جدید تجاری و پیشنهاد به مدیریت .
جمع‌آوری معلومات از بازار و ارائه گزارش‌های تحلیلی .
4) هماهنگی داخلی و پشتیبانی فروش (Sales Coordination):
هماهنگی با تیم‌های تخنیکی، عملیات، مالی و مارکیتینگ جهت پیشبرد فرصت‌ها .
هماهنگی و پیگیری مشکلات اجنت ها و مشتریان با دیپارتمنت مربوطه نقدپی .
اطمینان از تطبیق درست خدمات برای مشتریان جدید .
5) بازاریابی و تقویت برند (Marketing & Visibility):
حمایت از فعالیت‌های بازاریابی در سطح ولایات .
مشارکت در معرفی خدمات از طریق ایونت‌ها، جلسات و بازدیدها .
جمع‌آوری بازخورد بازار برای بهبود خدمات .
6) گزارش‌دهی و مستندسازی (Reporting & Documentation):
ثبت و مدیریت معلومات مشتریان، فرصت‌ها و فعالیت‌ها .
ارائه گزارش‌های منظم از فعالیت‌ها.
مستندسازی جلسات، توافقات و پیشرفت‌ها .
تحویلات (Deliverables):
دستیابی به اهداف تعیین‌شده در جذب مشتریان وتوسعه بازار.
ایجاد و مدیریت فعال فرصت‌های تجاری.
ارائه گزارش‌های منظم از فعالیت‌ها، فرصت‌ها و نتایج .
توسعه وحفظ روابط مؤثر با مشتریان و شرکا کلیدی.
صلاحیت‌ها و مهارت‌های مورد نیاز
شایستگی‌های عمومی:
توانایی توسعه بازار و ایجاد فرصت‌های تجاری در محیط‌های رقابتی .
مهارت قوی در برقراری ارتباط، مذاکره و مدیریت روابط با مشتریان و شرکا.
· مهارت قوی در ارتباطات و هماهنگی.
· برخورد مناسب و مسلکی با مشتریان.
· امانت‌داری و حفظ محرمانگی.
· دقت در مستندسازی و گزارش‌دهی.
· رفتار مسلکی با مشتریان، اجنت‌ها، صرافان و نمایندگان بازار.
· توانایی پیروی از پالیسی‌ها، طرزالعمل‌ها و الزامات تطبیق نقدپی.
مهارت‌های فنی و مسلکی :
آشنایی با مفاهیم فین‌تک، پول الکترونیکی ( E-Money )، وخدمات مالی دیجیتال.
درک عملی از سیستم‌های پرداخت، POS ، و اکوسیستم‌های مالی .
مهارت در تهیه پروپوزل‌ها، پریزنتیشن‌ها واسناد تجاری.
توانایی تحلیل بازار، شناسایی فرصت‌ها و ارزیابی رقبا .
مهارت در مدیریت فروش و پیگیری فرصت‌ها تا نهایی‌سازی.
مهارت‌های قوی در زبان‌های دری/پشتو و انگلیسی (نوشتار و گفتار) .
توانایی تهیه گزارش‌های منظم، دقیق و مبتنی بر داده .

Job Requirements
تحصیلات و تجربه:
حداقل لیسانس در رشته‌های اداره تجارت، مالی، اقتصاد، IT یا رشته‌های مرتبط .
حداقل ۳ – ۵ سال تجربه کاری در بخش توسعه تجارت، فروش، یا مارکیتینگ ( ترجیحاً در فین‌تک، بانکداری یا ICT).
داشتن تجربه عملی در جذب مشتریان، مدیریت روابط، و دستیابی به اهداف فروش .

Submission Guidelines
متقاضیان علاقه‌مند می‌توانند سی‌وی (CV) خود را با ذکر تجربه‌ های کاری مرتبط به ایمیل آدرس زیر ارسال نمایند: hr@naqdpay.af

tech_banking_jobs.title: Digital Banking General Manager
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking General Manager is responsible for properly managing and maintaining efficient ATM services and operations. This individual will be held accountable for the administration of quality services.
Network marketing and advertising are a crucial factor in improving ATM services. As the ADC Manager, you will work closely with vendors and management, in regards to appropriate ATM placement.

Duties and Responsibilities
The Digital Banking General Manager will be able to reflect back on their experience, to provide valuable insight and make informed decisions regarding how the organization could plan and achieve benchmark goals and objectives. This individual should possess a number of very important leadership qualities, as they are in charge of directing the work of fellow employees. They should be able to effectively communicate with employees and top management.
Provision of assessment allows the ATM Manger to determine the organizations current and future needs, regarding the operation of ATM services. The ADC Manager will be highly effective in recommending certain changes and is a critical component in implementing all new operational or service related processes. New approaches will be monitored and evaluated, and results will be communicated to top management.
The ADC Manager establishes a set of goals for the department and the organization. The ADC Manager sets goals that help contribute to the organization’s growth, by implementing and enforcing strategies that aim to optimize organizational operations and services. Operational services include support for debit and credit card production, deposits and withdrawals, retail business banking.
Preparation of written proposals and performance of cost benefit analysis, as well as risk analysis in conjunction with the organizations current policies and procedures, is the responsibility of the ADC Manager. This individual will negotiate pricing of certain products and services, in order to increase the amount of revenue generated from ATM related products and services, thereby contributing to the maximization of the organizations profitability. Effective strategies and techniques that work will be recommended accordingly.
The ADC Manager is responsible for administering the Bank’s Automated Teller Machine (ATM) products, operational systems, and services. The ADC Manager will provide oversight regarding the handling and managing of the ATM’s electronic fund transfer. This individual will assist customers with all ATM related issues including, but not limited to, account related problems and fraudulent transactions.
All issues will be handled in accordance with guidelines. The ADC Manager is also responsible for evaluating the daily performance of the ATM’s operational services and recommending upgrades and maintenance accordingly.

Job Requirements
The successful candidate will be a driven energetic individual with a positive can do attitude and will come with a good track record within the cash businesses.
With a good knowledge of operational and services issues and relevant experience, the candidate will have the ability to develop, manage and invest in his team. The candidate will plan, direct, manage and oversee all aspects of the ATM operation and services including technical and operational.
Must have excellent knowledge of the industry and have a sound understanding of the leading technology, operations and business partners needed to run ATM operations successfully.
The candidate will support and achieve financial objective of the business in coordination with the Cash/vault Services Manager and keep operations within budget.
Setting key performance measures for the team for monitoring the performance of ADC department.
Educated to Bachelor Degree or MBA level will be an advantage.
An educational qualification in ATM engineering or business related degree.
Minimum 3-4 years of experience in a similar role within the Cash business
Autonomous and results orientated, with a clear determination to succeed.
Excellent communication (written and verbal), interpersonal and negotiation skills.
Capable of working effectively and productively with senior team members.
Ability to maintain strong ethical and professional values.
Excellent command of written and spoken English and local languages
The ability to operate in diverse cultural environments.

Submission Guidelines
Qualified and interested applicants are encouraged to apply online through the BMA Job Portal at https://jobs.bma.com.af before the closing date.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.
Email / Application Form: https://jobs.bma.com.af

tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
استاد کادر دایمی مسؤولیت تدریس مضامین مربوط به رشته تخصصی خویش، تهیه پلان درسی، ارزیابی فعالیت‌های علمی و آموزشی محصلان، سهم‌گیری در امور اکادمیک پوهنحی و ارتقای کیفیت تدریس را به عهده دارد. موصوف مکلف است مطابق نصاب تحصیلی منظورشده، لکچرها، امتحانات، کارهای عملی و فعالیت‌های تحقیقی را تنظیم و تطبیق نماید. همچنان استاد کادر دایمی در برنامه‌های علمی، سیمینارها، تحقیق، راهنمایی محصلان، انکشاف نصاب و سایر امور محوله از طرف پوهنحی و پوهنتون همکاری فعال می‌نماید.

Duties and Responsibilities
استاد کادر دایمی یکی از اعضای مهم اکادمیک پوهنتون بوده و مسؤولیت دارد تا در بخش‌های تدریس، تحقیق، ارتقای کیفیت، راهنمایی محصلان و تطبیق برنامه‌های علمی و اکادمیک مطابق لوایح و مقررات وزارت تحصیلات عالی و پالیسی‌های پوهنتون ایفای وظیفه نماید. وظایف و مسؤولیت‌های عمده استاد کادر دایمی قرار ذیل می‌باشد :
تدریس مضامین مربوط به رشته تخصصی خویش مطابق نصاب تحصیلی منظورشده و پلان درسی پوهنتون .
تهیه و ترتیب پلان درسی، لکچر نوت، مواد آموزشی، منابع درسی و سایر وسایل کمک‌آموزشی جهت بهبود روند تدریس .
استفاده از میتودهای معیاری، مؤثر و نوین تدریس به منظور بلند بردن سطح فهم، مهارت و مشارکت محصلان در صنف .
ارزیابی منظم محصلان از طریق امتحانات وسط سمستر و نهایی، کارخانگی، پریزنتیشن، پروژه‌های تحقیقی، فعالیت‌های صنفی و سایر روش‌های اکادمیک .
تهیه سوالات امتحانی مطابق معیارهای علمی، اخذ امتحانات، تصحیح پارچه‌ها، ثبت نمرات و ارائه نتایج محصلان در زمان معین .
راهنمایی علمی و اکادمیک محصلان در زمینه درس، تحقیق، مونوگراف، پروژه‌های علمی و سایر فعالیت‌های آموزشی .
سهم‌گیری فعال در امور تضمین کیفیت، تطبیق معیارهای اکادمیک، تهیه اسناد مورد نیاز، گزارش‌دهی و همکاری در پروسه‌های ارزیابی داخلی و خارجی پوهنتون .
همکاری نزدیک و دوامدار با رئیس پوهنحی و آمر دیپارتمنت در تطبیق پلان‌های درسی، برنامه‌های اکادمیک، امور تدریسی، تحقیقاتی و اداری مربوط به دیپارتمنت و پوهنحی .
اشتراک فعال در جلسات دیپارتمنت، پوهنحی، کمیته‌های علمی، کمیته تضمین کیفیت و سایر کمیته‌های مربوطه پوهنتون .
سهم‌گیری در انکشاف، بازنگری و بهبود نصاب تحصیلی، کورس پالیسی‌ها، پلان‌های درسی و مواد آموزشی مطابق نیازهای علمی و بازار کار .
انجام فعالیت‌های تحقیقی، نوشتن مقالات علمی، تهیه آثار اکادمیک و اشتراک در سیمینارها، ورکشاپ‌ها، کنفرانس‌ها و برنامه‌های علمی .
همکاری در برگزاری برنامه‌های علمی، سیمینارها، ورکشاپ‌ها، کنفرانس‌ها، نمایشگاه‌های علمی و سایر فعالیت‌های اکادمیک پوهنتون .
رعایت نظم، حاضری منظم، اوقات کاری، اصول تدریس و رفتار مسلکی در محیط اکادمیک .
ایجاد فضای سالم، محترمانه و علمی در صنف و تشویق محصلان به تحقیق، مطالعه، خلاقیت و تفکر انتقادی .
تهیه گزارش‌های علمی، تدریسی، تحقیقی و اکادمیک طبق نیاز دیپارتمنت، پوهنحی و اداره پوهنتون .
همکاری در جمع‌آوری، ترتیب و نگهداری اسناد اکادمیک مربوط به مضامین، پلان‌های درسی، حاضری محصلان، نمرات و سایر اسناد مورد نیاز .
رعایت اصول، لوایح، طرزالعمل‌ها، مقررات و رهنمودهای وزارت تحصیلات عالی و پوهنتون .
اجرای سایر وظایف مرتبط که از طرف آمر دیپارتمنت، رئیس پوهنحی و رهبری پوهنتون به وی سپرده می‌شود .

Job Requirements
متقاضی بست استاد کادر دایمی باید واجد شرایط ذیل باشد:
داشتن حداقل سند تحصیلی ماستری در رشته مربوطه؛ سند دکتورا مزیت محسوب می‌گردد .
داشتن تجربه تدریس در نهادهای دولتی و خصوصی .
توانایی تدریس مضامین مسلکی مطابق نصاب تحصیلی و پلان درسی .
توانایی تهیه مواد درسی، سوالات امتحانی و ارزیابی محصلان .
داشتن توانایی تحقیق، مقاله‌نویسی و راهنمایی علمی محصلان .
آشنایی با پروسه‌های تضمین کیفیت و همکاری در امور اکادمیک .
داشتن مهارت‌های خوب ارتباطی، کار تیمی و رفتار مسلکی .
آشنایی با کمپیوتر و زبان‌های رسمی کشور؛ دانستن زبان انگلیسی مزیت است .
رعایت لوایح وزارت تحصیلات عالی و پالیسی‌های پوهنتون .

Submission Guidelines
علاقه‌مندان واجد شرایط می‌توانند درخواست خویش را همراه با خلص سوانح، کاپی اسناد تحصیلی، تذکره/کارت هویت و سایر اسناد مرتبط، الی تاریخ تعیین‌شده از طریق ایمیل یا به‌صورت حضوری به بخش منابع بشری پوهنتون ارسال نمایند.
در عنوان ایمیل باید نام بست و Vacancy no را به‌گونه واضح ذکر گردد. تنها با نامزدان واجد شرایط تماس گرفته خواهد شد.
برای معلومات بیشتر:
https://mohe.gov.af/ps-AF/Vacancy-card/vacancy-613
https://mohe.gov.af/fa-AF/Vacancy-card/vacancy-614

tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.
Requires quick work execution, competent English skills, honesty and reliability, and extensive knowledge or connections in Baghlan Province.

Duties and Responsibilities
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.

Job Requirements
Residing in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan; possessing basic English writing and communication skills; preference will be given to candidates with relevant government, military, or investigator experience; male candidates preferred

Submission Guidelines
Please submit your English resume on this website. Name your resume with your name and occupation. The resume should include your phone number, education, and detailed work experience (specifying position, company name, and responsibilities). Please update your resume regularly. Company staff will contact you via email; please check your inbox.
